sizeGuide.notes: Generate portrait realistic images, then export final short videos at 720x1280 to match current app examples.

items.name: Elephant
items.prompt: A realistic elephant in a natural jungle environment, full body visible, lush green foliage, natural daylight, detailed skin texture, cinematic wildlife photo look, no text, no watermark, portrait composition.
items.soundPrompt: Real elephant trumpet call, short clean wildlife sound, no music, no human voice.
items.description: Elephants are the largest land animals and use their trunk to eat and drink.

items.name: Tiger
items.prompt: A realistic tiger in a natural jungle environment, walking through dense tropical plants, detailed fur and stripes, natural lighting, cinematic wildlife photo style, no text, no watermark, portrait composition.
items.soundPrompt: Real tiger growl or roar, short clean wildlife sound, no music, no human voice.
items.description: Tigers are strong jungle hunters with beautiful striped fur.

items.name: Lion
items.prompt: A realistic lion in a natural wild environment with tall grass and trees, detailed mane, warm sunlight, wildlife documentary photo style, no text, no watermark, portrait composition.
items.soundPrompt: Real lion roar, short clean wildlife sound, no music, no human voice.
items.description: Lions are powerful big cats known for their loud roar.

items.name: Monkey
items.prompt: A realistic monkey in a natural jungle environment, sitting on a tree branch, rich green background, highly detailed fur and face, natural light, wildlife photo style, no text, no watermark, portrait composition.
items.soundPrompt: Real monkey chatter call, short clean wildlife sound, no music, no human voice.
items.description: Monkeys are smart and active animals that live in trees.

items.name: Parrot
items.prompt: A realistic colorful parrot in a natural jungle environment, perched on branch, detailed feathers, soft natural sunlight, wildlife photography style, no text, no watermark, portrait composition.
items.soundPrompt: Real parrot squawk/chirp, short clean wildlife sound, no music, no human voice.
items.description: Parrots are bright birds that can make many sounds.

items.name: Snake
items.prompt: A realistic snake in a natural jungle environment, coiled near leaves and branches, detailed scales, soft natural light, cinematic wildlife photo style, no text, no watermark, portrait composition.
items.soundPrompt: Subtle realistic snake hiss, short clean wildlife sound, no music, no human voice.
items.description: Snakes move by sliding and some use camouflage to hide.
